mission.title: oras: artifactType in index manifest and in its "manifests" descriptors
mission.description: artifactType in index manifest and in its "manifests" descriptors. Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check ORAS installation
steps.description:
Verify your ORAS version:
```bash
oras version
```
This feature requires ORAS CLI installed locally. Install via `brew install oras` or download from https://oras.land/docs/installation.

steps.title: Understand the feature context
steps.description:

steps.title: Apply the fix for artifactType in index manifest and in its "manifests"…
steps.description:
This extends the previously-accepted proposal with two additional features related to the artifactType manifest property:

- Both of the `oras manifest index` subcommands support an `--artifact-type` option, similar to that used with `oras push` today, that directly specifies an `artifactType`
```json
{
  "schemaVersion": 2,
  "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json",
  "artifactType": "application/vnd.opentofu.provider",
  "manifests": [
    {
      "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json",
      "artifactType": "application/vnd.opentofu.provider-target",
      "digest": "sha256:f22b608064cba5d2bcea544ea636acca254ff3dcfcf7e39f6218b302c07c0a80",
      "size": 616,
      "platform": {
        "architecture": "amd64",
        "os": "linux"
      }
    },
    {
      "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json",
      "artifactType": "application/vnd
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the feature is working as expected:
```bash
oras version
oras manifest fetch <registry>/<repo>:<tag>
```
Confirm that the feature described in "artifactType in index manifest and in its "manifests" descriptors" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This extends the previously-accepted proposal with two additional features related to the artifactType manifest property:

- Both of the `oras manifest index` subcommands support an `--artifact-type` option, similar to that used with `oras push` today, that directly specifies an `artifactType` value to include in the index manifest.

prerequisites.description: ORAS CLI installed (brew install oras or download from oras.land). Access to an OCI-compliant registry for testing.
